exercises.instructionText: Complete the table below.
exercises.note: Students write both the مضارع معلوم and مضارع مجهول forms for each English prompt.

exercises.instructionText: State whether the following patterns are مَاض or مُضَارِع; and مَعْلُوْم or مَجْهُوْل.

example.description: ضمة on first root letter + كسرة on second + وا ending

identificationKey.madiMaloom: عَيْن has فتحة/كسرة/ضمة in standard pattern (no internal ضمة+كسرة sequence)
identificationKey.madiMajhool: first root letter has ضمة + second has كسرة (فُعِلَ template)
identificationKey.mudariMajhool: حرف المضارع has ضمة (يُـ/تُـ/أُـ/نُـ) + penultimate letter has فتحة

exercises.note: PDF extraction of these abstract patterns is unreliable; all items flagged unclear. Answers are best-effort based on the systematic coverage of patterns expected in a 20-item exercise.
exercises.unclearNote: All 20 patterns are flagged unclear. The PDF extracts abstract placeholder patterns (using ـ for root letters) that are heavily garbled in text extraction. The answers above are reconstructed from the systematic structure of the exercise (4 categories × 5 patterns each). Verify every item against the printed book.
